blended.narrative: Cannon Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 19 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 44°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: light rain showers, highs of 45°F.
Saturday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 22°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 4" of snow, highs of 21°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 4" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 3.9" of snow, highs of 19°F. Expect powder.
